evals.prompt: Write markup for a save action and a text link to an About page.
evals.expected_output: Uses a native button for the action and a native anchor for navigation, instead of non-interactive elements with click handlers.
expectations: Actions use a <button> element
Navigation uses an <a> element
No non-interactive element is used as a button
The solution does not require custom keyboard event handlers for native controls

evals.prompt: Refactor a custom control so it is reachable and operable with Tab, Enter, and Space.
evals.expected_output: Uses a native interactive element where possible; otherwise includes role, tabindex="0", and keyboard handling for both Enter and Space.
expectations: The control is keyboard reachable
Enter and Space both activate the custom control if it is not native
The element is not left mouse-only
The implementation uses the smallest possible amount of ARIA and scripting

evals.prompt: Write CSS for focus styles on links and buttons in a dark and light theme.
evals.expected_output: Uses :focus-visible with a persistent visible ring and does not remove outlines without replacement.
expectations: The focus style uses :focus-visible
The focus ring remains visible against both light and dark backgrounds
Outline is not removed without a replacement
The indicator is clearly visible on keyboard focus

evals.prompt: Build a dialog that traps focus correctly and closes with Escape.
evals.expected_output: Uses native dialog semantics or a proper trap, returns focus to the trigger on close, and includes an Escape handler.
expectations: The dialog can be closed with Escape
Focus returns to the trigger after closing
Focus does not escape the dialog while open
The background is made inert or otherwise removed from the tab order

evals.prompt: Write a tab component where only the active tab is in the tab order and arrow keys move between tabs.
evals.expected_output: Uses roving tabindex for the tab list, with arrow keys to move between tabs and Enter or Space to activate the selected tab.
expectations: The tablist uses roving tabindex
Arrow keys move between tabs
Enter or Space activates the current tab
Inactive tabs are not all tabbable at once
